roof_system: white single-ply membrane (likely TPO/PVC) over a large warehouse footprint
roof_age_estimate: unknown; appears mid-life based on visible wear and seam weathering
observations: Large white single-ply membrane roof with generally uniform coverage.
Visible seam lines and perimeter detailing are intact overall with no obvious widespread open laps.
Minor surface staining and dirt accumulation are present, especially near drainage/low-traffic areas and along some edges.
A few localized dark patches and scuffs suggest normal aging and maintenance needs, but no clear widespread blisters, tears, or exposed substrate are visible.
Multiple rooftop penetrations/HVAC curbs are present and appear serviceable from this altitude, with no obvious major flashing failures visible in the image.
summary: The roof appears to be a large low-slope white membrane system in generally good condition from aerial view. Evidence of age is limited to mild staining, minor discoloration, and some localized edge wear, with no obvious severe distress or extensive ponding visible. The roof is likely serviceable, though routine inspection of seams, flashings, and rooftop penetrations is recommended.
recommendation: Continue regular preventive maintenance and perform a close-up field inspection of seams, flashings, drains, and rooftop equipment curbs. Clean and monitor the darker stained areas and verify there is no concealed deterioration at penetrations or perimeter details.
